testcase.name: Golden Path — Upload → Call → Prompt Evolution › upload content → call → prompt evolves

failure.message: golden-path.spec.ts:27:7 upload content → call → prompt evolves

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Quick Launch — Generate Mode › should load Quick Launch page with form
Quick Launch — Generate Mode › should show summary card with community info

failure.message: quick-launch.spec.ts:27:7 should show summary card with community info

testcase.failure:
[cloud] › tests/cloud/quick-launch.spec.ts:27:7 › Quick Launch — Generate Mode › should show summary card with community info Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('What you\'re building') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('What you\'re building') resolved to 3 elements: 1)
Describe what you're building above and we'll sug…
aka getByText('Describe what you\'re building above and we\'ll suggest a name') 2) … aka getByText('Describe what you\'re building and we\'ll suggest goals') 3)
What you're building
aka getByText('What you\'re building', { exact: true }) Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('What you\'re building') 30 | 31 | // Summary card should be visible with "What you're building" > 32 | await expect(page.getByText("What you're building")).toBeVisible(); | ^ 33 | }); 34 | 35 | test('should enable Build button when form is filled', async ({ page }) => { at /Users/paulwander/projects/HF/apps/admin/e2e/tests/cloud/quick-launch.spec.ts:32:58 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-cloud-quick-launch-Q-b5314-ry-card-with-community-info-cloud/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-cloud-quick-launch-Q-b5314-ry-card-with-community-info-cloud/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../test-results/tests-cloud-quick-launch-Q-b5314-ry-card-with-community-info-cloud/error-context.md Retry #1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: getByText('What you\'re building') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: getByText('What you\'re building') resolved to 3 elements: 1)

testcase.name: Call Simulation › should load sim page for caller

failure.message: sim-flow.spec.ts:48:7 should load sim page for caller

testcase.failure:
[cloud] › tests/cloud/sim-flow.spec.ts:48:7 › Call Simulation › should load sim page for caller ── Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('.wa-header-title') Expected substring: "E2E Test Caller" Error: strict mode violation: locator('.wa-header-title') resolved to 2 elements: 1)
HF Simulator
aka getByText('HF Simulator') 2)
Loading...
aka getByText('Loading...') testcase.name: Call Simulation › should receive AI greeting on page load
Call Simulation › should send message and receive AI response
Call Simulation › should end call and save transcript

failure.message: sim-flow.spec.ts:91:7 should end call and save transcript

testcase.failure:
[cloud] › tests/cloud/sim-flow.spec.ts:91:7 › Call Simulation › should end call and save transcript

testcase.name: Cloud Smoke › should load dashboard after login
Cloud Smoke › should display sidebar with navigation
Cloud Smoke › should load Callers page
Cloud Smoke › should load Domains page
Cloud Smoke › should load Pipeline page
Cloud Smoke › should load Specs page
Cloud Smoke › should load Quick Launch page

failure.message: smoke.spec.ts:52:7 should load Quick Launch page

testcase.failure:
[cloud] › tests/cloud/smoke.spec.ts:52:7 › Cloud Smoke › should load Quick Launch page ───────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('heading', { name: 'Quick Launch' }) Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('heading', { name: 'Quick Launch' })

testcase.name: Cloud Smoke › should load Settings page
Cloud Smoke › health API should return ok
Cloud Smoke › ready API should confirm specs loaded
